name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; pip3 install --user poetry && poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true && poetry install --with dev; echo '✅ Packages installed and Requirements met'

postAttachCommand.server: cd /workspaces/app_monitorias_2026-1 && /workspaces/app_monitorias_2026-1/.venv/bin/python -m streamlit run app/main.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
